manuscript_title: A Precision-Controlled Null Result for a Khinchin-Signature PSLQ Family
primary_contribution_notes: Reproducible, precision-controlled negative computational evidence that no low-complexity integer relation survives conservative PSLQ in a stated coordinate family. Includes a positive methodological contribution: a cross-precision stability-mask + conservative-cap / wide-cap diagnostic protocol that separates artefacts from structure.
methodological_signature: Khinchin-signature statistic S_n = (prod a_k)^{1/n} on simple-CF partial quotients
Conservative coefficient cap (maxcoeff = 1e3) vs wide-cap diagnostic (maxcoeff = 1e6)
Two-constant replication (pi and e) for null-regime robustness
Six fixed 3D/4D coordinate templates over {S_n, log S_n, S_n - K_0, log n}
claim_strength: Negative computational evidence — verified to 300-digit working / 600-digit confirmation precision; residuals below 1e-20 over a stability-masked prefix; reproducible. Scope explicitly local (not a universal impossibility theorem).

reproducibility_artifacts.data: residual logs, status-block JSON files, figure sources archived in repo
reproducibility_artifacts.supplementary_tables: two in-line tables (agent_h_table1.tex per-template pi counts; agent_h_table2.tex per-template e counts)

length_and_format.estimated_pages: 6-8 (short note format; abstract + 1 main section with 4 subsections + Discussion + AI/Compute disclosure + bibliography)

adjacent_literature_in_manuscript.title: Analysis of PSLQ, an integer relation finding algorithm
On the rapid computation of various polylogarithmic constants
Parallel integer relation detection: techniques and applications
Continued fractions, comparison algorithms, and fine structure constants

adjacent_literature_observation: Four of five most-cited works are in Mathematics of Computation. The literature centroid sits squarely in that venue's traditional remit (computational number theory / experimental constants).
pseudonymity_context: Author publishes under 'Shunsuke Kubota' with ORCID 0009-0000-6192-8273; no institutional affiliation on file. Important constraint for any venue requiring institutional letterhead, university subscription for APC waivers, or formal supervisor sign-off.
ai_disclosure_context: Paper includes a Computational and AI Disclosure section naming Copilot (VS Code) and Anthropic Claude. Author requires LLM-permissive (or at least neutral) venue policy.
